history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A circular emblem with a dark blue background and a gold outer rim. At the top of the circle, in light blue lettering, are the words "BADAN GIZI NASIONAL REPUBLIK INDONESIA". The emblem features the Garuda Pancasila, the national emblem of Indonesia, prominently in the center. The Garuda is depicted with outstretched wings, holding a shield divided into four quadrants, each representing a symbol of the Pancasila: a star, a banyan tree, a bull's head, and a stalk of rice and cotton. Below the shield, a banner reads "BHINNEKA TUNGGAL IKA" in gold lettering. Flanking the Garuda on either side are stylized human figures in a light brown, raised arm pose, symbolizing human development. Two green leaves are positioned at the bottom center of the emblem, suggesting growth and nature. The overall style is official and symbolic, with clear lines and vibrant colors. The lighting is even and direct, highlighting the details of the emblem. The color palette consists of deep blues, bright golds, earthy browns, and vibrant greens. The mood is authoritative, nationalistic, and indicative of public service, specifically related to national nutrition.
